methods.description: Process for collecting and preparing larvae for karyological study, including fixation and slide preparation.

steps.description: Fourth instar larvae were collected from 12 sites of the Central Caucasus and Ciscaucasia.
steps.searchable_summary: collect larvae from specified geographic locations

steps.description: Larvae were fixed in ethanol-glacial acetic acid (3:1).
steps.searchable_summary: fix larvae in ethanol-glacial acetic acid solution

steps.description: Slides of the chromosomes were prepared with ethanol-orcein technique.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare chromosome slides using ethanol-orcein technique

methods.description: Identification and mapping of chromosome banding sequences using photomaps and established systems.

steps.description: Identification of chromosome banding sequences for arms A, E, and F using photomaps of Wülker and Klotzli in the system of Keyl.
steps.searchable_summary: identify chromosome banding sequences using photomaps and Keyl system

steps.description: Chromosome mapping for arms C and D was performed according to Istomina and Kiknadze in the system of Dévai et al.
steps.searchable_summary: map chromosomes using Istomina and Kiknadze method

methods.description: Statistical analysis of chromosomal polymorphism using software packages for cluster analysis and comparison of various parameters.

steps.description: Software packages PAST 2.17 and STATISTICA 10 were used for statistical analysis (cluster analysis).
steps.searchable_summary: perform cluster analysis using PAST and STATISTICA

steps.description: Comparison of characteristics of chromosomal polymorphism using parameters like number of zygotic combinations, percentage of heterozygous larvae, etc.

methods.description: Calculation of cytogenetic distances between populations using Nei's method.

steps.description: Cytogenetic distances between populations were calculated according to Nei.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate cytogenetic distances using Nei's method
